name: betteraudio
title: BetterAudio
description: Control BetterAudio from Raycast — per-app volume, EQ, device routing, media controls, and more.
author: rokartur

commands.name: manage-apps
commands.title: Manage Apps
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: View and control per-app audio — volume, mute, EQ, and device routing.

commands.name: list-devices
commands.title: List Devices
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: View all audio devices and set the default output or input device.

commands.name: set-volume
commands.title: Set Volume
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Set the system output volume to a specific level.

commands.name: volume-up
commands.title: Volume Up
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Increase system volume by one step.

commands.name: volume-down
commands.title: Volume Down
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Decrease system volume by one step.

commands.name: toggle-mute
commands.title: Toggle Mute
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Toggle system input mute on or off.

commands.name: toggle-silent-mode
commands.title: Toggle Silent Mode
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Toggle silent mode on or off.

commands.name: cycle-device
commands.title: Cycle Output Device
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Switch to the next output device in your priority list.

commands.name: apply-profile
commands.title: Apply Profile
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Apply a saved audio routing profile.

commands.name: bluetooth-devices
commands.title: Bluetooth Devices
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: View connected Bluetooth audio devices and battery levels.

commands.name: toggle-panel
commands.title: Toggle Panel
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Toggle the BetterAudio menu bar panel.

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: BetterAudio
commands.description: Persistent menu bar item showing current volume and quick audio controls.

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: CLI Path
preferences.description: Custom path to the betteraudio CLI binary. Leave empty for auto-detection.
